basics.name: Alton Lee
basics.label: Student
basics.summary: Hiya! I'm Alton, studying for a B.S. in the Department of Information and Computer Sciences at the University of Hawaii. I expect to graduate in Fall, 2020

work.summary: Barista at Teapresso Bar on Waialae Ave, Honolulu, HI.
highlights: Take orders of drinks ranging from milk teas to smoothies
Take inventory of stock and count profits for the day
Gain experience in professionalism and customer service

work.summary: Summer Fun Leader during Summers 2017, 2018, and 2019.
highlights: Teach classes for children in arts and crafts, music and dance, sports and games
Create, plan, and manage lesson plans and activities, such as assemblies and a Finale program
Provide general supervision and entertainment for children and teens, ages ranging from 5 - 17
Must be enthusiastic, patient, and have a desire for child growth and development

work.summary: Gym Staff at Kaimuki Community Park.
highlights: Maintain park equipment and facility (gym, tennis and basketball courts, classrooms)
Oversee activities run within park
General supervision
First aid certified

work.summary: Librarian Assistant at Kaimuki Public Library.
highlights: Collect, organize, and shelve books within library
Organize shipment to and from outside liraries (in and out-of-island
Other minor tasks
Participated in club activities
Learned about cyber lockpicking and other hacking techniques

activities.summary: Participated in the 2018 Hawaii Annual Code Challenge.
highlights: Frontend developer for Team O.W.O.
Created Heat Map of trash per building
Fixed some broken lines of code
Actor and professional cheerleader
